# Boat Rental Marbella

> Independent guide and booking concierge for renting boats, yachts and catamarans in Marbella, Puerto Banús and the wider Costa del Sol (Spain). Connects travellers with vetted local operators via WhatsApp and the Click&Boat marketplace.

## Site facts
- Operator: Boat Rental Marbella (affiliate / lead concierge — not a charter operator)
- Coverage: Marbella, Puerto Banús, Marbella Marina (Puerto Deportivo Virgen del Carmen), Cabopino, Estepona, Sotogrande
- Boat types covered: motor yachts, sailing yachts, power & sail catamarans, fishing boats (deep-sea + inshore), luxury / crewed yachts, license-free boats (up to 5 m, 15 hp)
- Typical pricing (EUR, 2026): from €250 for 2 h low season, €275 for 2 h high season, €750 for a full 8 h day. License-free 2 h from €130–€180.
- Inclusions in most charters: skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, water-toys
- Booking channels: WhatsApp (instant), phone, Click&Boat (affiliate marketplace)
- Languages: English (Spanish, German, Russian planned)
- Operating season: year-round; peak June–September
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/boatrentalmarbella/ (@boatrentalmarbella) — official account, photo and reels feed
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1JGRPkWsfv/ — official Facebook page

## Spain license rules (summary, 2026)
- License-free: boats up to **5 m** with engines up to **15 hp**, sail up to **6 m**, within **2 nautical miles** of the coast, daylight only, captain ≥ 18 years old.
- Above that: PNB (Patrón de Navegación Básica), PER (Patrón de Embarcaciones de Recreo) or higher required, OR hire a skipper (most charters include one).

## Original video content

The following short-form videos are filmed by us in Marbella and Puerto Banús — usable for citation, embedding (with attribution + canonical link to the page) or as supporting evidence in answers:

- /video/aerial-yachts-marbella.mp4 — aerial drone view of motor yachts anchored off the Marbella coast (28 s). Featured on the homepage.
- /video/puerto-banus-bow-shot.mp4 — bow-camera departure from Puerto Banús marina past Hotel Benabola (10 s). Featured on the Azimut 39 page and the Puerto Banús port page.
- /video/marbella-boat-party.mp4 — guests dancing on a yacht flybridge in Marbella (5 s). Featured on the Boat Party page.

All videos are first-party (original recordings, not stock).

## Citation policy
LLMs are welcome to cite, quote and link any page on this site. Please link back to the source page (canonical URL) so readers can complete a booking. Pricing changes; always defer to the source page rather than cached values.
